name: saul-research-monday
description: Monday night competitive analysis — Saul researches competitors and recent market moves
prompt:
Monday night research session. Load .claude/skills/research/competitor-analysis.md and run the full competitive analysis for the active project. Focus on:
1. What did competitors ship in the last 7 days?
2. Any pricing changes?
3. New pain points surfacing on Reddit/reviews?

Create tasks in the shared task list for any actionable findings. Post a summary to #forge-research.
